equipment_type.description: Standard rounds reworked into a delivery system for a nanobot payload. On a hard hit the round fragments and releases its nanobots at the surface; against a softer target it lodges and releases them inside. The round itself does little damage - it is armor-neutral and low-penetration. The nanobots are the weapon: once released, they spread through the target on their own, long after the round has stopped.
equipment_type.strategy_tip_optional: Increases Combat Power and Intimidation. Physical attacks apply Grey Goo, which stacks, deals damage over time, persists for normal combat durations, and spreads to nearby enemies when a target dies.
